title: dendrochilum murudense
intro: Dendrochilum murudense is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to the island of Sarawak in Malaysia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dendrochilum murudense include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat various types of infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is said to be effective when taken orally or applied topically.
